name: source-folder closed-loop step folder-auto-scaffold creates the namespaced folder from the registry entry
command: mkdir -p generated-code-quality-standards .claude-tdd-pro && printf 'sources: [{id: google-new, source_namespace: google}]\n' > .claude-tdd-pro/STANDARDS-URLS.yaml && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/generated-code-quality-standards/closed-loop-test.sh" --step folder-auto-scaffold --registry .claude-tdd-pro/STANDARDS-URLS.yaml --root generated-code-quality-standards 2>err.txt && [ -d generated-code-quality-standards/google ] && [ -f generated-code-quality-standards/google/google-new.yaml ] && echo ok 1>&2
